title: A Fish Swimming Upside Down
original_title: Ein Fisch, der auf dem Rücken schwimmt
overview: Andrea, a woman without a past, is the object of both Philipp’s and his son’s desire. A love triangle filled with expectations, longing and fears leaves open the speculation of who knows what about whom.
